B

Bat - Class in model
Class to model the behaviour of bat-monsters It extends the superclass Monster
Bat() - Constructor for class model.Bat
Class constructor
Bomb - Class in model
Class for the bomb objects that are placed by the bomber.
Bomb() - Constructor for class model.Bomb
Class constructor.
bombsView - Static variable in class view.BombView
 
BombView - Class in view
Class about the view-part of the bombs, to pass the position without the need for the model and the view to communicate
BombView(int, int) - Constructor for class view.BombView
Class constructor
